name: nodics
description: Nodics, A Node based enterprise application solution

scripts.test:basic: npm run check:syntax && npm run quality:copyright && npm run test:config && npm run test:governance && npm run test:status-catalog && npm run test:traceability && npm run test:headers && npm run test:route-contracts && npm run test:generated && npm run test:system && npm run test:import && npm run test:profile && npm run test:cache && npm run test:cronjob && npm run test:ems && npm run test:search && npm run test:dynamo && npm run test:workflow && npm run test:topology:consolidated
scripts.test:basic:report: node gFramework/nTooling/bin/nodics-tool.js test:report --suite=basic -- npm run test:basic
scripts.test:full: npm run test:basic && npm run test:topology:modular
scripts.test:full:report: node gFramework/nTooling/bin/nodics-tool.js test:report --suite=full -- npm run test:full
scripts.test:traceability: npm run test:error-traceability && npm run test:execution-layer-traceability
scripts.test:headers: npm run test:auth-security && npm run test:auth-p2:contract && npm run test:auth-invalidation && npm run test:auth-headers && npm run test:route-action-authorization && npm run test:module-headers && npm run test:response-status
scripts.test:route-contracts: node gFramework/nTooling/bin/nodics-tool.js test:route-contracts && npm run test:openapi
scripts.test:generated: npm run test:schema-test-generator && npm run test:generated-live-guards && node gFramework/nTooling/bin/nodics-tool.js test:generated
scripts.test:generated-live-guards: node gFramework/nTooling/bin/nodics-tool.js test:live-tenant-guard && node gFramework/nTooling/bin/nodics-tool.js test:suite-reporter
scripts.test:import: npm run test:import-validation && npm run test:import-tenant-precedence && npm run test:import-test-tenant-isolation && npm run test:environment-sample-data && npm run test:mandatory-init-import && npm run test:import-lifecycle && npm run test:remote-import-transport && npm run test:core-sample-data-catalog && npm run test:kickoff-test-tenant-data && npm run test:import-formats && npm run test:import-diagnostics && npm run test:import-run-summary && npm run test:import-run-history && npm run test:import-run-history-routes && npm run test:duplicate-header-diagnostics && npm run test:finalized-record-counter && npm run test:finalized-import-dispatch && npm run test:import-failure-traceability && npm run test:import-export-access-policy
scripts.test:import:report: node gFramework/nTooling/bin/nodics-tool.js test:report --suite=import -- npm run test:import
scripts.test:profile: npm run test:profile-init-flag && npm run test:profile-init-required && npm run test:profile-mandatory-bootstrap && npm run test:profile-user-group-permissions && npm run test:profile-identity-governance && npm run test:profile-identity-governance-p1 && node gFramework/nTooling/bin/nodics-tool.js test:capability-behavior --area=profile
scripts.test:ems: npm run test:ems-client-routes && npm run test:ems-message-tenant && node gFramework/nEms/emsClient/test/emsClientServiceContract.test.js && node gFramework/nEms/emsClient/test/emsMessageProcessContract.test.js && node gFramework/nTooling/bin/nodics-tool.js test:capability-behavior --area=ems
scripts.test:search: npm run test:search-routes && node gFramework/nSearch/search/test/searchControllerRequestMapping.test.js && node gFramework/nSearch/search/test/searchServicePipelineContract.test.js && node gFramework/nSearch/search/test/indexerServiceContract.test.js && node gFramework/nSearch/search/test/searchCachePolicyContract.test.js
scripts.test:workflow: npm run test:workflow-routes && node gCore/workflow/flowCore/test/workflowServicePipelineContract.test.js && node gCore/workflow/flowCore/test/workflowActionPerformEngineContract.test.js && node gCore/workflow/flowCore/test/workflowEngineCorrectnessContract.test.js && node gCore/workflow/flowCore/test/workflowSplitAndRetryContract.test.js && node gCore/workflow/flowCore/test/workflowEventContinuationContract.test.js && node gCore/workflow/flowSchema/test/workflowSchemaRouterContract.test.js && node gFramework/nbpm/test/workflowLifecyclePipelineContract.test.js
scripts.test:topology:report: node gFramework/nTooling/bin/nodics-tool.js test:report --suite=topology -- npm run test:topology
scripts.test:topology:consolidated:report: node gFramework/nTooling/bin/nodics-tool.js test:report --suite=topology-consolidated -- npm run test:topology:consolidated
scripts.test:topology:modular:report: node gFramework/nTooling/bin/nodics-tool.js test:report --suite=topology-modular -- npm run test:topology:modular
scripts.test:config: node gFramework/nConfig/test/configurationValidation.test.js && node gFramework/nConfig/test/nonRuntimePackageDiscovery.test.js && node gFramework/nDatabase/database/test/tenantDatabaseConfigurationValidation.test.js && npm run test:module-metadata && npm run test:tooling && npm run test:layered-test-discovery && npm run test:llm-context
scripts.test:auth-p2: npm run test:auth-p2:contract && npm run test:auth-p2:redis
scripts.test:governance: npm run test:layered-customization && npm run test:schema-overrides && npm run test:router-overrides && npm run test:runtime-overrides && npm run test:schema-access-policy && npm run test:schema-read-access-policy && npm run test:schema-write-access-policy && npm run test:artifact-overrides
scripts.test:runtime-overrides: node gFramework/nConfig/test/runtimeOverrideGovernance.test.js && node gFramework/nDynamo/test/runtimeRouterConfigurationService.test.js && node gFramework/nDynamo/test/routerConfigurationGovernance.test.js && node gFramework/nDynamo/test/runtimeConfigurationAuditService.test.js && node gFramework/nDynamo/test/runtimeConfigurationActivationAudit.test.js && node gFramework/nDynamo/test/runtimeConfigurationRollbackService.test.js && node gFramework/nDynamo/test/runtimeConfigurationPreviewService.test.js && node gFramework/nDynamo/test/runtimeConfigurationActivationPolicyService.test.js && node gFramework/nDynamo/test/runtimeConfigurationActivationPolicyEnforcement.test.js && node gFramework/nDynamo/test/runtimeConfigurationActivationRequestService.test.js && node gFramework/nDynamo/test/runtimePropertyConfigurationGovernance.test.js && node gFramework/nDynamo/test/runtimeConfigurationGovernanceSummaryService.test.js && node gFramework/nDynamo/test/runtimeConfigurationGovernanceCleanupService.test.js
scripts.test:cache: node gFramework/nCache/cache/test/cacheIsolationAndCorrectnessContract.test.js && node gFramework/nCache/cache/test/cacheMutationSecurityContract.test.js && node gFramework/nCache/cache/test/cacheDiagnosticsContract.test.js && node gFramework/nCache/cache/test/cacheBenchmarkContract.test.js && node gFramework/nCache/cache/test/cachePolicyContract.test.js && node gFramework/nCache/cache/test/cacheAdapterContract.test.js && node gFramework/nCache/cache/test/cacheInvalidationContract.test.js && npm run test:cache:redis-live
scripts.build: npm run ai:validate && npm run quality:copyright && npm run quality:docs && node -e 'require("./nodics").buildAll()' && npm run quality:copyright:fix && npm run docs:openapi && npm run llm:generate && npm run governance:report && npm run quality:docs:generated && npm run quality:copyright

author: Nodics Framework <nodics.framework@gmail.com>
